title: Jason Fry

{{Quote|Wookieepedia is a fabulous resource. Love it and use it a lot. But it's always a starting pt ''[point]'' for further verification, not an endpoint.|Jason Fry|<ref name="Facebook Recap">{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/latestnews/story/Jason_Fry_Facebook_QA_Recap_144784.asp|text=Jason Fry Facebook Q&A; Recap|date=2012-04-11|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20190829210801}}</ref>}}
'''Jason C. Fry''' is the author of numerous ''[[Star Wars]]'' stories and reference books. He has written for [[Wizards of the Coast]] and ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''. He also frequents the forums of [[TheForce.net]]. He has a special interest in ''Star Wars'' [[astrography]] and was a co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' with [[Daniel Wallace]]. The likenesses of Fry and Wallace were even used in one image of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] in the ''Atlas''.

Although he has primarily written ''Star Wars'' reference books and articles, Fry has also expanded into the realm of fiction, having authored such works as the short story "[[Deader than a Triton Moon]]" and the young-readers' novel ''[[The Clone Wars: Darth Maul: Shadow Conspiracy]]''. His first original novel, titled ''The Jupiter Pirates: Hunt for the Hydra'', was released by [[Wikipedia:HarperCollins|HarperCollins]] Publishing on [[December 23]], [[2013]].<ref name="Jupiter Pirates">{{WordPress|subdomain=jasonfry|url=jupiter-pirates|name=Jason Fry|text=The Jupiter Pirates|author=[[Jason Fry]]|archivedate=20190803212801}}</ref>

In [[2017]], Fry was tapped to write the [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Expanded Edition|adult novelization]] of the film [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']]. Fry also authored the associated ''The Last Jedi'' titles [[The Last Jedi: Bomber Command|''Bomber Command'']] and [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: Incredible Cross-Sections|''Incredible Cross-Sections'']].<ref name="lastjedi">{{StarWarsShow|3Qv8RdPK8E4|New The Last Jedi Images, The Star Wars Show Goes Hollywood, Lost Lucasfilm Loot, & More!}} {{C|interviewed}}</ref>
